spec.goal: Make self-review a hard gate for review-repair so repaired PR changes are self-reviewed clean before any repair-batch commit or push, then reflect that rule in source and live runtime guidance.
success_criteria: review-repair/SKILL.md requires review-prepare to return no_findings on the repaired diff before any repair-batch commit or push
review-prepare/SKILL.md makes clear that refreshing a PR head includes the post-repair self-review path
source smokes fail if the self-review gate between review-repair and delivery-prepare/review-request regresses
home/codex/AGENTS.md states the self-review-before-push rule for review-repair batches
the installed runtime skills and live ~/.codex/AGENTS.md are synced to the updated source guidance
focused verification passes after the update
constraints: Keep the change scoped to the review workflow contracts and their smoke coverage
Do not rename skills or broaden the workflow beyond this self-review gate
Use the already-active skills workspace lane and existing nix branch
Preserve the existing review-request re-entry and delivery-prepare gate semantics

tasks.title: Tighten source review workflow contracts
tasks.objective: Update review-repair and review-prepare so review-repair batches must clear self-review before commit or push, and make the trigger wording explicit for refreshed PR heads after repair.

tasks.title: Lock the new gate in source smokes
tasks.objective: Update the review-repair source smoke and the nix source smoke so the self-review gate cannot be removed without a failing check.
outputs: Stronger source smoke coverage for the review-repair self-review gate

tasks.title: Propagate the rule to global guidance and runtime
tasks.objective: Update nix home/codex AGENTS guidance, then sync the installed skills and live ~/.codex/AGENTS.md so the runtime follows the new self-review-before-push rule immediately.
outputs: Updated installed runtime skills and AGENTS

triggers: The self-review gate requires introducing a new orchestration skill instead of tightening review-repair and AGENTS contracts
The live runtime cannot be updated through the existing installed skill sync and darwin-rebuild path
Source and live guidance diverge in a way that needs a broader workflow redesign

evidence: 2026-03-19: Updated review-repair/SKILL.md so any repair batch that changes the branch must clear review-prepare on the repaired diff before any repair-batch commit or push, then route through delivery-prepare only after that self-review gate is clean.
2026-03-19: Updated review-prepare/SKILL.md and dev/review-prepare/run_smoke.py so review-prepare explicitly covers PR head refreshes, including the post-review-repair path.

2026-03-19: Updated /Users/xavier/Documents/nix/home/codex/AGENTS.md and /Users/xavier/Documents/nix/dev/smoke/codex/run_scout_skeptic_source_smoke.py so the global review workflow requires review-prepare before any repair-batch commit, push, or review-request re-entry.

2026-03-19: Verified with python3 dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py, python3 dev/review-prepare/run_smoke.py, python3 /Users/xavier/Documents/nix/dev/smoke/codex/run_scout_skeptic_source_smoke.py, git diff --check, and git -C /Users/xavier/Documents/nix diff --check.

2026-03-19: Hot-synced /Users/xavier/.codex/skills/review-repair and /Users/xavier/.codex/skills/review-prepare, then ran sudo -n -H darwin-rebuild switch --flake /Users/xavier/Documents/nix#acg-box so live ~/.codex/AGENTS.md now carries the new self-review-before-push rule.

local_checkpoint.current_theory: review-repair currently enforces verification before push but not a clean review-prepare self-review pass on the repaired diff, so repaired heads can be pushed with avoidable self-review debt.
local_checkpoint.contradictory_evidence: The broader workflow already requires review-prepare before entering PR review, and review-repair already gates commit or push on delivery-prepare and re-review.
local_checkpoint.missing_evidence: Need contract text and smoke coverage that explicitly require review-prepare to clear repaired diffs before repair-batch commit or push.
local_checkpoint.next_action: Patch review-repair, review-prepare, and the source/global smoke coverage, then sync the runtime guidance.
